Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena

Class Constants

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.Constants
public class Constants extends Object
Constants used by the RdfSerializer and RdfParser classes.
See Also:

      • Constant Field Values

    • RDF_juneauNs_ITEMS

      public static final String RDF_juneauNs_ITEMS
      RDF property identifier "items".

      For resources that are collections, this property identifies the RDF Sequence container for the items in the collection.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • RDF_juneauNs_ROOT

      public static final String RDF_juneauNs_ROOT
      RDF property identifier "root".

      Property added to root nodes to help identify them as root elements during parsing.

      Added if RdfSerializer.Builder.addRootProperty() setting is enabled.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • RDF_juneauNs_TYPE

      public static final String RDF_juneauNs_TYPE
      RDF property identifier "class".

      Property added to bean resources to identify the class type.

      Added if Serializer.Builder.addBeanTypes() setting is enabled.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • RDF_juneauNs_VALUE

      public static final String RDF_juneauNs_VALUE
      RDF property identifier "value".

      Property added to nodes to identify a simple value.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • RDF_NIL

      public static final String RDF_NIL
      RDF resource that identifies a null value.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      public static final String RDF_SEQ
      RDF resource that identifies a Seq value.

      RDF resource that identifies a Bag value.
